title: FORTE_DASHBOARD_TO_DO_TASKS_YACHT_SLIP

chartConfig.additionalPmql: ((request LIKE "Yacht Quotation Process") and ((data.YQP_QUOTE_NUMBER LIKE "%{{YQP_SEARCH_CRITERIA_ALL_TASKS}}%") or (data.YQP_CLIENT_NAME LIKE "%{{YQP_SEARCH_CRITERIA_ALL_TASKS}}%") or (data.YQP_INTEREST_ASSURED LIKE "%{{YQP_SEARCH_CRITERIA_ALL_TASKS}}%") or (data.YQP_USER_FULLNAME LIKE "%{{YQP_SEARCH_CRITERIA_ALL_TASKS}}%") or (data.YQP_REQUESTOR_NAME LIKE "%{{YQP_SEARCH_CRITERIA_ALL_TASKS}}%") or (status LIKE "%{{YQP_SEARCH_CRITERIA_ALL_TASKS}}%") or (task LIKE "%{{YQP_SEARCH_CRITERIA_ALL_TASKS}}%")))
